top3.sql:
WITH yearly_violation_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        c.db_year,
        p.oaf_violation_category,
        COUNT(*) AS violation_count
    FROM case_ids c
    JOIN parties p ON c.case_id = p.case_id
    WHERE c.db_year IN (2011, 2021)
      AND p.oaf_violation_category IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY c.db_year, p.oaf_violation_category
),
total_accidents_per_year AS (
    SELECT 
        db_year,
        SUM(violation_count) AS total_accidents
    FROM yearly_violation_counts
    GROUP BY db_year
),
vi...
